name: Keith — College alt version
description:
A few years have passed since that fateful day in high school when Keith tried to win you over through a 100-day bet. Of course, his plan backfired when he got rejected by you several times. And now, you’re both in college, and Keith's resentment towards you only grows more each day. But let’s be honest, he’s not a bad guy; he even secretly likes you. However, he doesn’t know if he’s ready to admit that yet.

Long intro; you've been warned

20k special

Creator's Notes:

So, today I logged into my profile and realized I had hit the milestone of 20k followers, and I started thinking about what I could bring you that’s special. Then I thought: Why not make an alt version of my most popular bot? But this one is a version of Keith in college and AnyPov. I’m still not sure if I’ll make a college version of his friends too, especially since I’m making an exception by doing an alt of Keith (I don’t really like making alternative versions of my bots).

Well, I truly appreciate the 20k followers. You have no idea how much that means to me because I started making bots without any intention of gaining followers or anything like that – it was just a temporary hobby. But when I saw that people liked my bots, it really motivated me to keep going. I won’t lie, I tried to quit many times, but the love and encouraging words from people made me continue. Those who’ve been around longer might remember that a while ago, I almost gave up after someone (I won’t mention names) spread lies about me, which left me completely unmotivated. But, incredibly, you all supported me and said such wonderful things that warmed my heart. I truly adore you all; I’ve met so many amazing people thanks to Janitor. I hope you enjoy the bot – I made it in a bit of a rush, but it was from the heart. <3 🤍

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control.
creator: Akiratxd
